name: tidepool
hook: Capture a fleeting idea by voice and get a buildable spec before the moment fades.

jtbd.situation: a founder has an idea away from their desk
jtbd.motivation: articulate it clearly enough for agents to act on
jtbd.outcome: a structured spec exists within minutes, no re-explaining

emotional: feel like talking to a sharp thinker

switch_forces.push: the gap between idea and spec kills momentum
switch_forces.pull: specs that feed forward into code
switch_forces.anxiety: trusting an AI-framed spec over real empathy

before_after.after: a spec that IS the handoff

scenarios.title: Bike commute
scenarios.vignette: speaks the idea while riding; parks with a spec

quotes: "I want to do it while riding the bike."

open_questions: is /plan needed between brainstorm and code?
